_source: Grounded in docs/design/component-visual-contract.md (UI need -> Mx component). Keys are UI-kit CSS class names found inside the rendered .phone; values are the suggested MemoX shared component. ONLY unambiguous mappings live here; ambiguous classes (ov, title, status-dot, muted) are deliberately left out so the exporter does not guess. The pill-btn button family is disambiguated in code by the primary/secondary/outline modifier class, so it is intentionally NOT listed here.
_note: Adding a key changes generated specs; re-run `npm run export:specs` after editing.
